name: renameTab
description: Renames a tab in a Google Docs document. Use listDocumentTabs to get tab IDs first.

documentId.description: The document ID — the long string between /d/ and /edit in a Google Docs URL.

tabId.description: The ID of the tab to rename. Use listDocumentTabs to get tab IDs.

newTitle.description: The new title for the tab.
